About the Space

Drawiin دراوين is a new artist-run space, collective design studio, and community library in Carthage, Tunisia focussed on environmental communication. Our studio is nestled between a small pine forest and a field of wheat in Carthage Mohamed Ali.

We collaborate closely with other artists, organizations, and our neighbors to produce prints, publications, landscape designs, films, workshops, pop-up events, and more. Remembering that cultural production is always political, we always work in tandem with movements for environmental justice and collective liberation.

About

Drawiin دراوين is a new artist-run space, collective design studio, and community library in Carthage, Tunisia focussed on environmental communication. We collaborate closely with other artists, organizations, and our neighbors to produce prints, publications, landscape designs, films, workshops, pop-up events, and more. Remembering that cultural production is always political, we always work in tandem with movements for environmental justice and collective liberation.
